# End-to-end briefing workflow with fake research evidence and fake Feishu.
exec pinax init vault --title Vault --json
exec pinax briefing recipe init --topic 'AI tooling' --vault vault --json
exec pinax briefing recipe set --source fake:hermes --vault vault --json

exec pinax briefing run --dry-run --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"briefing.run"'
stdout '"dry_run":"true"'
stdout 'AI tooling'

exec pinax briefing run --dry-run --vault vault --agent
stdout 'command=briefing.run'
stdout 'fact.dry_run=true'
stdout 'fact.candidates='

exec pinax briefing run --yes --vault vault --events
stdout '"type":"start"'
stdout '"type":"end"'
stdout '"command":"briefing.run"'
exists vault/.pinax/briefing/review-queue.json
exists vault/notes/briefing

exec pinax briefing deliver feishu --webhook $PINAX_FAKE_FEISHU_URL/hook/raw-token --secret-ref env://FEISHU_WEBHOOK --title 'Daily briefing' --text 'AI tooling update' --yes --vault vault --json
stdout '"command":"briefing.deliver.feishu"'
stdout '"remote_write":"true"'
! stdout 'raw-token'
! stdout 'FEISHU_WEBHOOK'

-- vault/notes/context.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_context
title: Agent workflow
kind: reference
---

# Agent workflow

Markdown notes and local tooling.
